title: Device Settings - Unpair Headset from Charge Stand
scenario: Verify that after unpairing the headset from the Charge Stand, the Software Update section no longer shows Charge Stand information.
steps: Clear the trusted device list on the Charge Stand.
Remove the headset from the companion app.
Remove the headset from the phone's Bluetooth settings.
Open Device Settings on the headset.
Navigate to the Software Update section.
Observe whether any information about the Charge Stand is displayed.
expected: The Software Update section in Device Settings no longer shows any information about the Charge Stand.
